prestazioni: Engine swap to Nissan HR16DE (1.6L I4, 114hp stock) with a HKS GT-SS turbo kit (Garrett GT2560R turbo, 264° HKS camshafts, and HKS Hi-Power exhaust with 60mm piping) for a target of 220hp at 1.5 bar boost, paired with a Haltech Elite 1500 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping

Full KW Variant 3 coilover suspension with 30-way adjustable damping, custom-valved for the Viewt’s 2,450mm wheelbase and 1,200kg curb weight, paired with Eibach Pro-Kit springs (-30mm front, -25mm rear) to eliminate body roll

Nismo 4-piston front brake calipers (from Nissan Micra K13) with 280mm rotors and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads, paired with stainless steel braided lines and Motul RBF660 brake fluid for fade-resistant stopping power
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit (Viewt-specific front bumper, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with custom carbon fiber overfenders to fit 17x8.5 ET35 Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (gold finish) wrapped in 215/40R17 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires

Full custom retrim in Bridge of Weir leather (two-tone black and tan) with diamond stitching, including door cards, dashboard, and Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (Nissan S14 shell) with Takata 4-point harnesses
JDM-spec Mitsuoka Viewt K11 retro styling conversion (1960s Jaguar Mk2-inspired grille, LED headlights with Hella Bi-Xenon projectors, and custom chrome-plated side mirrors from a Nissan Figaro)
